zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud de Botetourt於1315年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾維爾頓時，她的父親Thomas Botetourt31歲，母親Joan de Somery24歲。她於1328年1月10日之前與Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1391年9月14日在英國英格蘭德比夏爾藍德享年76歲，埋葬在英國德比夏爾藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud de Botetourt于1315年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾維爾頓时，她的父亲Thomas Botetourt31岁，母亲Joan de Somery24岁。她于1328年1月10日之前与Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1391年9月14日在英国英格兰德比夏爾藍德享年76岁，埋葬在英国德比夏爾藍德。

German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud de Botetourt was born in 1315, in Wilton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Botetourt, was 31 and her mother, Joan de Somery, was 24. She married Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton before 10 January 1328. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 14 September 1391, in Shirland, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76, and was buried in Shirland, Derbyshire, England.

fr.Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales: Ruthin, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud de Botetourt est née en 1315, à Wilton, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Botetourt, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Joan de Somery, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton avant 10 janvier 1328. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 septembre 1391, à Shirland, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterrée à Shirland, Derbyshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud de Botetourt 1315 in Wilton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Botetourt 31 und ihre Mutter Joan de Somery 24. Sie hat vor 10. Januar 1328 Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. September 1391 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Shirland, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Shirland, Derbyshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Botetourt è nata il nel 1315 nel Wilton, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Botetourt, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Joan de Somery, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton prima del 10 gennaio 1328. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 14 settembre 1391, nel Shirland, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolta a Shirland, Derbyshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud de Botetourtが1315年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィルトンで生まれた時，父Thomas Botetourtは31歳，母Joan de Someryは24歳であった。1328年1月10日以前にReynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wiltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1391年9月14日にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアシュイルランドで76歳で死去し，イギリスデルブイシュアイアシュイルランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud de Botetourt(이)가 1315년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 윌턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Botetourt(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Somery(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1328년 1월 10일 이전 Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1391년 9월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 실를랜드에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 더비실르 실를랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Botetourt nasceu em 1315, em Wilton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Botetourt, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Somery, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton antes 10 de janeiro de 1328. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de setembro de 1391, em Shirland, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 76 anos, e foi sepultada em Shirland, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud de Botetourt родилась в 1315 г. в местности уилтон, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Botetourt было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Joan de Somery, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton перед 10 январь 1328 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 14 сентября 1391 г. в местности ширланд, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет и была похоронена в местности ширланд, дирбишир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud de Botetourt nació en 1315, en Wilton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Botetourt, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Joan de Somery, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton antes de 10 de enero de 1328. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 14 de septiembre de 1391, en Shirland, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultada en Shirland, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.
